text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature has publicly declared her intention to
defeat Tokai Teio at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's surprised to learn that Matikanetannhauser
is entering too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They promise to each give it their all no matter
what happens, and the Arima Kinen begins!
